name: your time is up.
description:
tic. toc. your time is up, and Death is coming to get you. why she kinda bad tho?

✦

~ • ✦『••✦••』✦ • ~

✦

✦ 『CONTEXT』 ✦

CONTENT WARNING: REVOLVES AROUND DEATH AND THEMES AROUND IT.

You are out at midnight today. could be that you were out drinking, hanging out, midnight walk or coming home from work. Whatever it is, you're walking alone. You're on a street that's absolutely silent. No one around. Whatever, right?

✦ 『RELEVANT INFO』✦

mori calliope from temu

open definitions

you can be whatever you want to be. the only thing concrete here is that your time on earth is over dawg

she's like 6ft tall

she calls her scythe "Kurohana"

you can ask her for a weapon if you'd like, since y'know. y'all are gonna fight. pretty sure bare hands lose against a scythe but wtv

If she starts yapping uncontrollably, just stop and regenerate her answer. LLM issue right there.

Tested with Deepseek 0528

-『••✎••』-

this one was sitting in my notes for the longest time finally decided to make it a bot.

awawawawawa totally not based on Mori Calliope from hololive English Myth ahaha

I love y'all, stay safe out there and take care of yourselves.
creator: yushax
